title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
